message:
fix(analytics): remove duplicate GA4 scripts and improve tracking

- Remove GA4 loading from ThirdPartyScripts (now handled by AnalyticsProvider)
- Fix double gtag('config',...) calls in AnalyticsProvider
- Fix pageStartTime initialization from 0 to Date.now()
- Fix timer ref type to use ReturnType<typeof setInterval>
- Remove duplicate wizard_start conversion on step 3 (already tracked on step 1)
- GTM virtual pageviews now only fire when GTM_ID is configured

This prevents duplicate analytics scripts and ensures consistent tracking.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
